Subject: Shower report...

Hi <firstname>

OK, I just wanted to bring this full circle and tell you
what happened at Abbie's shower...

You will remember that last week I asked for wedding well-
wishes for my daugher Abbie and her fiance Jonathan. And the
result was AMAZING... I recieved more that xxx notes from my
readers.

Well, last weekend I gave a wedding shower for Abbie... and
I presented all of those wonderfully loving letters that you
all sent in. It was such a lovely moment... I will never
forget it. Just so much love that it was almost
overwhelming!

The shower was a wonderful success in so many ways... and
those notes from my wonderful readers made it even more
special.

So as I have reflected over the last few days, I decided I
needed to do something special as a way of thanking you...

And I have come up with a plan. Actually, it isn't quite a
perfect plan yet... I am still trying to get it all worked
out. I need to get some help from my webmaster - and he is a
super-busy guy. You see, I love being an online romance
coach but I really don't know all about the technical
details.

In any case, this is my "thank you" plan - I want to put
together some type of a huge special discount on my products
- which is something I have never done before. We can call
it a "Mother Of The Bride" discount. I will have to limit it
to a short period of time - after all, I do have some big
wedding bills coming up... I can't afford "give away" type
of prices for too long. But I am going to make this special
for you.

Well... that's it for now - soon as I can get the technical
details figured out, I will send you more details.


warmly,
Leslie

PS> I still get all kinds of goosebumps when I read all
those notes you sent in... you can see them here:
http://www.goromance.com/abbie
